title: matricaria leucanthemum
intro: Matricaria leucanthemum, also known as the English daisy or wild chamomile, is a low-growing, flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and soothing effects. The health benefits of Matricaria leucanthemum include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. It can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and topical creams, which are often used to calm the mind and soothe the skin.
